title: Creamy Salty Greek Yogurt Salad
description: A refreshing and indulgent Greek yogurt salad with roasted red pepper, romano pepper, and a blend of fresh vegetables, cheeses, and olives.
instructions: Arrange the whole red bell pepper on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes, turning halfway until the skin is blistered and softened. Let it cool, then peel, seed, and dice into a cup.
Dice the cucumber and halve the cherry tomatoes. Slice the olives and crumble the feta.
In a bowl, whisk together the Greek yogurt, minced garlic, freshly squeezed lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
Add the roasted pepper, cucumber, tomatoes, olives, feta, and chopped romano pepper to the yogurt mixture. Stir gently until all ingredients are evenly coated.
Toss the salad with the chopped dill for added freshness.
Let the salad chill in the refrigerator for at least 10 minutes to meld the flavors.
Serve cold, optionally drizzling a little extra olive oil on top.
Optionally garnish with a few whole olives or a sprig of dill before serving.
Enjoy a creamy, salty, and slightly spicy Greek-inspired salad that’s perfect for lunch or a light dinner.
